title: Tweak Definition
description: Schema for a single tweak definition used by the WinOptimizer Core Engine.

apply.description: PowerShell script block or command to apply the tweak.

revert.description: PowerShell script block or command to revert the tweak.

risk.description: Risk level: low=cosmetic, medium=may affect functionality, high=critical system change.

reversible.description: Whether the tweak can be reliably reverted.

compatible_with_vanguard.description: Whether this tweak is safe to use when Vanguard anti-cheat is installed.

requires_restart.description: Whether a system restart is required after applying.
